item.title: Version 1.0.20
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.20 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * Fix ActivityBar component card chrome by @char1eslu in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/140 * Fix brightness refresh for reconnected displays by @rkrkrkk in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/141 * Feature/display power switch by @rkrkrkk in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/144
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.19...v1.0.20
